news.t: Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH
Bitwise Expands Option Income Suite With Launch of Circle, Ethereum Covered Call ETFs; Tickers ICRC and IETH

overview.description: The Bitwise Ethereum Option Income Strategy ETF (IETH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long eth, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, employing a synthetic covered call strategy on Ether (ETH) ETPs. The fund aims to generate income by capping gains, while leaving losses uncapped IETH was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Bitwise.
